latest.title: Forests make cooler air under the canopy
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next

latest.title: Peacocks only pretend to fly for show
latest.script_key: peacocks only pretend to fly watch their wings lift but they drop right back down that s because they evolved to sprint not soar their tail feathers weigh more than their bodies that s why they can t stay up did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Cows aren't calm—they’re on silent patrol
latest.script_key: cows aren t dozing they re scanning for danger notice how their ears swivel like radar dishes that s why they spot a coyote before you do now they re quietly deciding if you re friend or threat did you ever assume they were just lazy

latest.script_key: bees reveal the dance map first watch closely because a bee dance can carry direction and distance the hive reads that pattern like a living map then sends more workers to the same flowers tiny body huge navigation system which insect should we decode next

latest.title: Lightning makes air explode into thunder
latest.script_key: lightning turns air into a shock wave watch the flash first because lightning heats a narrow path of air extremely fast that air expands suddenly and the pressure wave reaches us as thunder the sound is the atmosphere snapping back which storm signal next

latest.title: Tropical forests don't just restore themselves
latest.script_key: trees don t just grow back on their own those misty forests they stay alive because tiny birds carry seeds miles away without them the canopy would stay empty watch this one twice because the birds do the heavy lifting not the wind ever seen a bird move a seed this far

latest.title: Sea turtles steer with Earth's magnetic field
latest.script_key: this turtle s got built in gps that stripey head s not decoration it s a magnetic compass tiny bits of magnetite in its brain line up with earth s poles that s why it never gets lost miss that and you d think it s just drifting ever wonder how they find the same beach after decades at sea there you go

latest.title: Tigers' paws survive the snow better than yours
latest.script_key: tiger paws spread wide like snowshoes the pads are thick enough to handle 100 f temperature swings because blood vessels run deep to keep them warm that s why this cat strolls like it s summer what would you try walking on bare snow without boots

latest.title: The moon keeps one face turned toward Earth
latest.script_key: the moon shows us one face for a reason watch the moon s position because its rotation and orbit are locked together it spins once in about the same time it circles earth so the same side keeps facing us that is synchronized motion not stillness which orbit clue next
